text:
CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
CMMI Data Sharing (CMDS) — Beneficiary File
Version — April 2025
SAS name Label Type Length Format Values
MODEL_ID Model Identifier CHAR 2 refer to Model ID tab
ENTITY_ID Entity Identifier CHAR 10
BENE_ID Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID CHAR 15
START_DATE Beneficiary Start Date DATE 8 CCYYMMDD
END_DATE Beneficary End Date DATE 8 CCYYMMDD
VLNTRY_IND Voluntary Alignment Indicator CHAR 1 Y = Beneficiary Voluntarily Aligned
N = Beneficiary
